name: Frog Legs Fried in Bread Crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the frog legs.
2. Mix salt, oil, pepper, half of the chopped parsley, and a small amount of lemon juice to pickle the legs.
3. Coat the frog legs in this mixture.
4. Dip them in a mixture of flour, eggs, and bread crumbs.
5. Fry the coated frog legs in hot lard until golden brown.
6. Garnish with the remaining parsley that has been fried in bread crumbs and slices of lemon.
